commands.name: dashboard-api-check
commands.stdout_tail:
> big-small-dashboard@0.0.0 api:check
> npm run api:generate && git diff --exit-code src/api/generated/openapi.json src/api/generated/schema.d.ts


> big-small-dashboard@0.0.0 api:generate
> npm run api:export && openapi-typescript src/api/generated/openapi.json -o src/api/generated/schema.d.ts && prettier --write src/api/generated/openapi.json src/api/generated/schema.d.ts


> big-small-dashboard@0.0.0 api:export
> python ../scripts/export_dashboard_openapi.py

wrote <repo>/dashboard/src/api/generated/openapi.json with 89 paths
✨ openapi-typescript 7.13.0
🚀 src/api/generated/openapi.json → src/api/generated/schema.d.ts [130.7ms]
src/api/generated/openapi.json 120ms
src/api/generated/schema.d.ts 191ms
